project.name: xsystem4
project.description: Open-source reimplementation of AliceSoft's System 4 game engine for Unix-like systems. Executes .ain bytecode with a stack-based VM, implements 127+ HLL modules, renders via OpenGL/GLSL with SDL2, and supports 3D rendering, audio mixing, and a full UI widget system (Parts Engine).

nodes.name: iarray.c
nodes.summary: Serialization/deserialization utilities for integer arrays used by Save/Load HLL functions. Supports writing/reading int, float, string, struct, and array types to/from an integer array stream.

nodes.name: iarray_init_writer
nodes.summary: Initializes an iarray_writer with a 1024-element heap buffer and optionally writes a header string as integer codepoints.

nodes.name: iarray_write_string
nodes.summary: Serializes a Shift-JIS string to the iarray writer, encoding SJIS 2-byte characters as combined 16-bit integer words, terminated by a zero.

nodes.name: iarray_write_struct
nodes.summary: Serializes a struct page to iarray by iterating members and writing each value according to its AIN type, with optional type tag prefix.

nodes.name: iarray_write_array
nodes.summary: Serializes an array page to iarray: writes element count followed by each element value recursively by AIN type.

nodes.name: iarray_write_text_style
nodes.summary: Serializes a text_style struct (face, size, bold, weight, edge offsets, colors, scale) to iarray for save game persistence.

nodes.name: iarray_init_reader
nodes.summary: Initializes an iarray_reader from a VM array page, optionally verifying a header signature at the start.

nodes.name: iarray_read_struct
nodes.summary: Deserializes a struct from an iarray stream into a new VM page by reading each member according to its AIN type.

nodes.name: iarray_read_array
nodes.summary: Deserializes an array from an iarray stream: reads element count, allocates an ARRAY_PAGE, then reads each element recursively.

nodes.name: iarray_read_text_style
nodes.summary: Deserializes a text_style struct from iarray, restoring all font properties (face, size, bold, weight, edge, colors, scale).

nodes.name: iarray.h
nodes.summary: Header declaring iarray_writer and iarray_reader structs plus all serialization/deserialization function prototypes for the integer array save/load system.

nodes.name: system.c
nodes.summary: Core v14 'system' HLL library implementing save/load (ResumeSave/ResumeLoad, GroupSave/Load, SerializeStruct/DeserializeStruct), event processing (Peek/PeekAll), OS interaction (Sleep, OpenWeb, MsgBox), and engine utility functions.

nodes.name: system_ResumeSave
nodes.summary: Saves the entire VM state (heap, stack, call stack, IP) to disk with a 2-second throttle to prevent frequent expensive serialization.

nodes.name: system_ResumeLoad
nodes.summary: Schedules a VM state load by storing the key and path as pending strings; actual load is deferred to the CALLHLL handler in vm.c to avoid stale heap references.

nodes.name: system_SerializeStruct
nodes.summary: Serializes a struct from a VM array page to a gsave-format .asd file (v7), wrapping the struct as a single global record.

nodes.name: system_DeserializeStruct
nodes.summary: Reads a gsave .asd file, resolves the root struct type by name, reconstructs the VM struct, and stores it in the target array page.

nodes.name: system_IsDebugMode
nodes.summary: Returns true for AIN v14+ games. Critical: Dohna Dohna gates its UpdateComponent loop behind this check, so returning true enables scene delegate dispatch.

nodes.name: system_CopySaveFile
nodes.summary: Copies a save file from src to dest using 8KB chunks, both paths resolved relative to the save directory.

nodes.name: system_GroupSave
nodes.summary: Saves a named group of global variables to a gsave file, returning the count of saved globals via an output parameter.

nodes.name: system_GroupLoad
nodes.summary: Loads a named group of global variables from a gsave file, returning the count of loaded globals via an output parameter.

nodes.name: vmAnime.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmAnime library managing CG animation handles: open/close animations with CG ranges, configurable interval and position, optional audio channel, and frame-by-frame rendering with blend-add-saturate compositing.

nodes.name: vmAnime_Draw
nodes.summary: Plays a CG frame animation: captures background, iterates frames loading CGs and blending with add-saturate, timing each frame, optionally restoring the background on completion.

nodes.name: vmAnime_Open
nodes.summary: Allocates a new animation handle from the id_pool, storing CG base index, frame count, and animation type.

nodes.name: vmArray.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmArray library with bulk integer array operations: arithmetic transforms (Add/Sub/Mul/Div/And/Or/Xor Num/Array), count/find/replace predicates, spiral search on rect and hex grids, flood-fill paint, and 2D rect/hex copy.

nodes.name: vmArray_AroundRect
nodes.summary: Spirally searches a 2D rectangular grid array for a target value, starting one step north and spiraling outward (NE/SE/SW/NW), with a step limit.

nodes.name: vmArray_AroundHexa
nodes.summary: Spirally searches a hexagonal grid array for a target value, handling the staggered column layout where odd columns are one row shorter.

nodes.name: vmArray_PaintRect
nodes.summary: Flood-fills a rectangular grid with Manhattan distance values from (x,y), leaving negative (blocked) cells at -2 and unreached cells at -1.

nodes.name: vmArray_PaintHexa
nodes.summary: Flood-fills a hexagonal grid with distance values from (cx,cy) using hex adjacency (4 orthogonal + 2 diagonal neighbors based on column parity).

nodes.name: vmArray_CopyHexaToHexa
nodes.summary: Copies a region from one hex grid to another, correctly handling the row offset correction needed when source and destination have different column parity.

nodes.name: vmArray_GrepLowOrder
nodes.summary: Finds the index of the minimum unvisited element in s_array (skipping elements marked in d_array), marks it visited, and returns its index.

nodes.name: vmCG.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmCG library for loading/unloading CG image assets into VM surfaces, and blending CGs onto existing surfaces with alpha-map compositing.

nodes.name: vmCG_Load
nodes.summary: Loads a numbered CG asset, creates a VM surface from it with pixel/alpha metadata, and returns the surface handle.

nodes.name: vmCG_Trans
nodes.summary: Blends a CG onto an existing surface at (x,y), using copy_with_alpha_map for alpha surfaces or blend_amap for non-alpha surfaces.

nodes.name: vmChrLoader.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmChrLoader library wrapping the ChrLoader subsystem for character data blobs: existence checks, name/message retrieval, and rendering blob data to a VM surface.

nodes.name: vmChrLoader_MemoryToSurface
nodes.summary: Decodes a CG from a character blob in memory and copies it onto a VM surface at position (x,y).

nodes.name: vmCursor.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmCursor library providing mouse cursor position get/set, wrapping the input subsystem.

nodes.name: vmDalkGaiden.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmDalkGaiden library with game-specific helpers for DALK Gaiden: enemy index search in a struct bank and full-map rendering with sprite overlay on a 45x45 hex-like grid.

nodes.name: vmDalkGaiden_PutFullMap
nodes.summary: Renders the DALK Gaiden full map: loads background and sprite CGs, then for each 45x45 cell draws terrain tiles and unit sprites based on three weight layers and a mask.

nodes.name: vmData.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmData library for loading numbered binary data assets from the game archive and reading them as typed arrays (char/short/int/string) or seeking within them.

nodes.name: vmData_Load
nodes.summary: Loads a numbered ASSET_DATA file from the archive into a vm_data handle with an internal buffer pointer.

nodes.name: vmData_ReadArrayInt
nodes.summary: Reads int32 values from a vm_data buffer sequentially into a flat integer array page.

nodes.name: vmDialog.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmDialog library providing SDL-based message boxes; input/select dialog variants are stubbed as TODO.

nodes.name: vmDrawGauge.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmDrawGauge library implementing a gauge widget: loads a CG strip, renders a proportional fill onto a dedicated VM surface using alpha-map compositing.

nodes.name: vmDrawGauge_Open
nodes.summary: Creates a gauge handle: loads the CG, allocates a render surface of the same dimensions, and stores both in a vm_drawgauge struct.

nodes.name: vmDrawGauge_Draw
nodes.summary: Draws the gauge at current fill ratio (now/max): clears with magenta transparency then copies a proportional width from the CG texture.

nodes.name: vmDrawMsg.c
nodes.summary:
HLL vmDrawMsg library for rendering rich text with markup tags (, , , , , ,

, , , ) onto three separate surfaces (drop-shadow, bold, text).

nodes.name: vmDrawMsg_Open
nodes.summary: Creates a vmDrawMsg handle with three RGBA surfaces (drop-shadow/bold/text), initializes default Gothic 24pt bold white text style.

nodes.name: vmDrawMsg_Draw
nodes.summary: Parses the accumulated message string with markup tags and renders text/effects to the appropriate surfaces, handling color, bold, font face, drop-shadow, size, position, and line-break tags.

nodes.name: vmDrawNumber.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmDrawNumber library for rendering numeric values onto a VM surface using a CG digit strip, supporting left/right/center alignment and zero-padding modes.

nodes.name: vmDrawNumber_Open
nodes.summary: Creates a vmDrawNumber handle: loads a 10-digit CG strip, allocates a surface sized for the requested figure count and spacing.

nodes.name: vmDrawNumber_Draw
nodes.summary: Renders an integer onto the gauge surface by formatting it with sprintf, then blitting each digit glyph from the CG strip with alignment correction.

nodes.name: vmFile.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmFile library for binary file I/O in the save directory: read/write typed arrays and struct/array pages, XOR encode/decode, file search and directory creation.

nodes.name: vmFile_Open
nodes.summary: Opens a save-directory file for reading (memory-mapped buffer) or writing (stdio FILE), returning a handle from the id_pool.

nodes.name: vmFile_Encode
nodes.summary: XOR-encodes the file buffer in-place using a rolling mask derived from seed and rand, prepending a 8-byte header with the initial mask and checksum.

nodes.name: vmFile_Decode
nodes.summary: Decodes an XOR-encoded file buffer, verifying the checksum and reporting a warning on mismatch.

nodes.name: vmFile_Find
nodes.summary: Finds the Nth file matching a wildcard pattern in the save directory, supporting a single '*' wildcard.

nodes.name: vmGraph.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmGraph library providing 2D graphics operations between VM surfaces: copy, blend (add-satur, alpha-map, screen), fill operations, stretch copy with nearest-neighbor, and effect transitions.

nodes.name: vmGraph_EffectCopy
nodes.summary: Performs an effect-animated blit: initializes a transition effect, copies the source surface, then steps the effect over total_time milliseconds at ~60fps.

nodes.name: vmGraph_CopyStretch
nodes.summary: Copies and stretches a source surface region to a destination, temporarily switching texture sampling to nearest-neighbor to prevent magenta edge artifacts.

nodes.name: vmGraphQuake.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmGraphQuake stub library for screen-shake effects; SetMode, SetAmpX, SetAmpY are warn-unimplemented, others are TODO.

nodes.name: vmKey.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmKey library managing configurable key-mapping handles: maps Windows virtual keys to game return values, with throttled event polling to prevent CPU spin and mouse wheel support.

nodes.name: handle_events_throttled
nodes.summary: Polls SDL events with a CPU throttle: every 30 calls sleeps 10ms to prevent busy-loop 100% CPU usage in input-polling tight loops.

nodes.name: vmKey_Get
nodes.summary: Polls all registered key mappings in the handle's table, returning a bitmask of all currently-pressed game keys.

nodes.name: vmMapLoader.c
nodes.summary: HLL vmMapLoader library loading .map files (AliceSoft MAP format with MT19937 XOR encryption) and providing accessors for grid dimensions, base CG list, move/figure tables, and metadata.

nodes.name: vmMapLoader_New
nodes.summary: Loads a numbered .map file, verifies the 'Map\0' magic, then decrypts the body with MT19937 XOR using seed 12753.

nodes.name: vmMapLoader_GetFigure
nodes.summary: Looks up the unit/figure type at grid position (x,y) from the map's figure table, returning 0 if not found.

nodes.name: parts_internal.h
nodes.summary: Internal header for the Parts Engine. Defines all data structures (parts, parts_state, parts_motion, parts_flash, parts_text, etc.), enums for state/type/motion/blend modes, and cross-module function declarations.

nodes.name: parts.c
nodes.summary: Core Parts Engine implementation. Manages the global parts list and hash table, lifecycle (alloc/free pool, get, release), transform propagation (pos/z/alpha/scale/rotation/color), state management, CG/animation/gauge/numeral content setting, and the main update loop (PE_Update). Implements all PE_* HLL entry points for widget manipulation.

nodes.name: construction.c
nodes.summary: Construction Process subsystem. Implements a deferred drawing pipeline where scripts queue drawing operations (create, fill, draw CG, draw text, gray filter) that are executed together to build a parts texture.

nodes.name: motion.c
nodes.summary: Parts motion/tween animation system. Manages time-based interpolation of position, alpha, CG frame, scale, rotation, vibration, and gauge rate. Supports multiple easing curves. Implements PE_BeginMotion/PE_EndMotion lifecycle and PE_AddMotion* HLL API.

nodes.name: input.c
nodes.summary: Parts Engine input handling. Processes mouse position and button state each frame to update hovered/clicked part state, dispatch click events via message queue, and handle background-click re-delivery across nested WaitForClick calls.

nodes.name: render.c
nodes.summary: Parts Engine OpenGL rendering. Loads the parts GLSL shader, renders each parts type (CG, text, flash, animation) with full transform matrix, blend mode, add/multiply color, and alpha-clipper support.

nodes.name: text.c
nodes.summary: Parts text widget implementation. Renders SJIS text into per-character textures organised in lines, supports font style (face, size, color, bold, edge), and exposes PE_SetText/PE_AddPartsText/PE_SetFont HLL API.

nodes.name: flash.c
nodes.summary: SWF/Flash animation player for parts. Loads SWF files, interprets tag stream (shapes, bitmaps, sprites, sounds, actions), maintains a display list, and seeks/updates frame-by-frame with audio playback.

nodes.name: save.c
nodes.summary: Parts Engine save/load serialisation. Serialises the entire parts tree (all states, params, motions, numeral fonts) to an iarray page. Includes a v14 workaround: caches last PE_Save result so PE_Load can fall back when ResumeSave/ResumeLoad are stubs.

nodes.name: debug.c
nodes.summary: Parts Engine debugger integration. Serialises parts tree to JSON for inspection, provides debugger commands (show, list, save-texture, render-to-file). Conditionally compiled under DEBUGGER_ENABLED.

nodes.name: parts
nodes.summary: Core UI widget object. Contains sprite base, three state slots (default/hovered/clicked), local and global transform params, parent/child tree links, motion list, click/cursor sound, delegate index, unique_id (v14), component_type (v14), user_component_name (v14).

nodes.name: parts_state
nodes.summary: A single visual state of a parts object (default, hovered, or clicked). Holds a parts_type discriminant and a union of CG / text / animation / numeral / gauge / construction_process / flash data.

nodes.name: parts_params
nodes.summary: Transform and visibility parameters: z-order, position, show flag, alpha, scale XY, rotation XYZ, additive color, multiply color. Exists in both local (script-set) and global (inherited) forms.

nodes.name: parts_motion
nodes.summary: A single tween keyframe: motion type, easing curve, begin/end values (int, float, or point), begin_time, end_time. Stored in a per-parts TAILQ list.

nodes.name: parts_flash
nodes.summary: SWF Flash player state: SWF file reference, current tag pointer, display list TAILQ, bitmap/sprite/dictionary hash tables, elapsed time, current frame, stop/end flags.

nodes.name: parts_construction_process
nodes.summary: Deferred drawing pipeline: holds a common texture header and a TAILQ of parts_cp_op drawing operations. Operations are queued by script then executed together by parts_build_construction_process.

nodes.name: parts_text
nodes.summary: Text widget state: array of lines, each containing per-character textures (parts_text_char), line spacing, cursor position, and text_style for font properties.

nodes.name: parts_cp_op
nodes.summary: A single drawing operation in the Construction Process pipeline. Type discriminant selects from union: create, cg, fill, cut_cg, text, or filter.

nodes.name: PE_Init
nodes.summary: Initialises the Parts Engine: creates the 1M-bucket parts hash table, calls parts_render_init and parts_debug_init. Idempotent.

nodes.name: PE_Update
nodes.summary: Main per-frame update: handles SDL events, updates components, audio, animations, input state, motion time, render dirty, and throttles scene_render+gfx_swap to ~60fps. Includes broken-timer workaround that computes real elapsed time via CLOCK_MONOTONIC.

nodes.name: PE_UpdateComponent
nodes.summary: Processes the dirty list: resolves pending parent assignments, propagates combined params from parent to children, and updates z-order via parts_list_resort.

nodes.name: parts_get
nodes.summary: Looks up or lazily creates a parts object by number. Uses a free-list pool to avoid malloc churn. Inserts new parts into the global list.

nodes.name: parts_release
nodes.summary: Frees a parts object: clears all state slots and motions, severs parent/child links, removes from list and scene, frees user_component_name, and returns to pool.

nodes.name: parts_list_ensure_sorted
nodes.summary: Deferred z-order sort of the parts list. Uses a temporary array + qsort for O(n log n) stability. Called before any z-ordered iteration.

nodes.name: PE_SetDelegateIndex
nodes.summary: Sets the delegate index on a parts object and auto-enables clickable if the part already has a CP texture — compensates for DG_STR_TO_METHOD failures in UserComponent wrappers.

nodes.name: parts_set_pos
nodes.summary: Sets local position, recalculates all state hitboxes, recursively updates global positions for this part and all children, then marks dirty.

nodes.name: parts_numeral_update
nodes.summary: Renders a numeric value to a texture using the numeral font (separate CGs or combined strip), handling digits, commas, and minus sign. Rebuilds output texture on each call.

nodes.name: parts_numeral_font_init
nodes.summary: Initialises a numeral font by loading individual digit CGs (SEPARATE / SEPARATE2) or slicing a combined strip CG (COMBINED mode) into per-digit textures.

nodes.name: parts_update_animation
nodes.summary: Per-frame animation tick: advances elapsed time for each ANIMATION-type part, advances frame index, and swaps the current texture.

nodes.name: parts_build_construction_process
nodes.summary: Executes the queued Construction Process operations in order to produce the final texture: create, fill, draw CG, copy CG, draw/copy text, gray filter.

nodes.name: PE_BuildPartsConstructionProcess
nodes.summary: HLL entry point: validates state, retrieves construction process for the given parts/state, and calls parts_build_construction_process.

nodes.name: PE_AddCreateToPartsConstructionProcess
nodes.summary: Queues a CREATE op (allocate RGBA texture of given dimensions) to the construction process pipeline.

nodes.name: add_text_to_cproc
nodes.summary: Internal helper that builds a parts_cp_text op with full text_style from individual style parameters and enqueues it as DRAW_TEXT or COPY_TEXT.

nodes.name: PE_BeginMotion
nodes.summary: Starts a motion sequence: resets motion_t to 0, sets is_motion flag, and initialises all parts to their motion start values.

nodes.name: PE_EndMotion
nodes.summary: Ends a motion sequence: resets timers, clears all motion lists, and signals global[2]=1 so WaitForClick can exit to allow Motion::Join to re-check IsEnd.

nodes.name: PE_SetMotionTime
nodes.summary: Advances motion time to t, applies all active motions via parts_update_with_motion, and auto-calls PE_EndMotion when t >= motion_end_t.

nodes.name: apply_curve
nodes.summary: Maps a linear [0,1] progress value through a named easing curve: linear, ease-in/out, ease-in-out, cubic-in/out/in-out.

nodes.name: parts_update_with_motion
nodes.summary: Applies a single motion keyframe to a parts object at the current motion time: sets pos, alpha, CG, gauge rate, numeral number, scale, rotation, or vibration.

nodes.name: PE_AddMotionVibrationSize
nodes.summary: Adds a vibration motion that randomly offsets the part position by a decreasing amplitude, simulating a shake effect.

nodes.name: PE_UpdateInputState
nodes.summary: Per-frame input processing: re-delivers pending background clicks, iterates all parts to update hover state, detects mouse-down transition to dispatch click messages and sound effects, handles background-click global variable signal.

nodes.name: PE_IsCursorIn
nodes.summary: HLL query: tests if a given mouse position falls within the hitbox of a parts object in a given state.

nodes.name: parts_render_init
nodes.summary: Loads the parts.v.glsl / parts.f.glsl shader and caches all uniform locations (blend_rate, bot_left, top_right, add_color, multiply_color, use_clipper, clipper_tex, inv_clipper_transform).

nodes.name: parts_render
nodes.summary: Renders a single parts object: checks visibility and message_window flags, dispatches to parts_render_cg, parts_render_text, or parts_render_flash based on state type.

nodes.name: parts_render_texture
nodes.summary: Core GPU render call: builds a gfx_render_job with world/view transforms, sets blend_rate/color uniforms, optionally binds alpha-clipper texture with inverse transform, then runs the job.

nodes.name: parts_render_flash
nodes.summary: Renders all objects in the Flash display list, setting per-object OpenGL blend modes (multiply, screen, add) before dispatching to shape or sprite rendering.

nodes.name: parts_text_append
nodes.summary: Appends SJIS text to a parts_text, rasterising each character into its own texture and advancing the cursor. Recalculates overall dimensions on completion.

nodes.name: PE_SetFont
nodes.summary: HLL API: sets font face, size, color, bold weight, edge color, and edge weight on the text state of a parts object.

nodes.name: parts_flash_load
nodes.summary: Loads a SWF file by name from asset archive into a parts_flash struct: initialises hash tables for dictionary/bitmaps/sprites, parses the SWF header to get frame dimensions, and resets playback state.

nodes.name: parts_flash_seek
nodes.summary: Seeks the SWF tag stream to a target frame, processing define/place/remove/action tags along the way. Rewinds and replays from frame 0 if seeking backwards.

nodes.name: parts_flash_update
nodes.summary: Advances Flash playback by passed_time milliseconds, computing delta frames from the SWF frame rate and calling parts_flash_seek.

nodes.name: start_sound
nodes.summary: Handles SWF StartSound tag: constructs a WAV header from the uncompressed PCM sound definition and plays it via audio_play_archive_data.

nodes.name: PE_Save
nodes.summary: Serialises all visible and hidden parts to an iarray page with magic 'XPE' and version 3. Caches a copy for v14 ResumeSave/ResumeLoad stub workaround.

nodes.name: PE_Load
nodes.summary: Deserialises parts from an iarray page. Falls back to pe_save_cache if buffer is NULL (v14 stub workaround). Releases all parts first, then reconstructs the full tree.

nodes.name: save_parts
nodes.summary: Serialises a single parts object: number, state, three state slots, local/global params, parent, delegate, clickable, sounds, origin_mode, link indices, draw_filter, message_window, alpha_clipper, and motion list.

nodes.name: load_parts
nodes.summary: Deserialises a single parts object from iarray: restores all fields, queues pending_parent, adds motions, resorts, marks dirty, and recalculates hitboxes.

nodes.name: parts_engine_to_json
nodes.summary: Serialises the entire parts tree to JSON. In verbose mode includes all top-level parts with full recursive child expansion.

nodes.name: parts_to_json
nodes.summary: Recursively serialises a single parts object to cJSON: all three states, local/global params, motions, children.

nodes.name: parts_debug_init
nodes.summary: Registers 'parts' debugger module with show/list/save/render sub-commands.

nodes.name: linear_blur.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for a horizontal linear-blur scene transition effect. Blends old/new scene textures while applying a parabolic fade and a sine^4 blur envelope that peaks at mid-progress, producing a soft cross-dissolve with motion blur.

nodes.name: mosaic.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for a mosaic/pixelation scene transition. Divides the screen into coarse tiles whose size peaks at mid-progress (progress=0.5), sampling the tile-center color and blending old/new scenes linearly across the transition.

nodes.name: noise_crossfade.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for a noise-based crossfade transition. Uses a pseudo-random hash of (tex_coord, progress) to generate per-pixel gray noise, mixing it with the old scene in the first half and the new scene in the second half.

nodes.name: sepia_noise_crossfade.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for a sepia-tinted noise crossfade. Like noise_crossfade but tints the noise with a warm sepia color (RGB 1.0/0.888/0.691) for a vintage film-burn appearance during transition mid-point.

nodes.name: turn_page.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader simulating a page-turn transition. Divides the screen into three regions—old scene, mirrored old scene (curling page back), and new scene—using diagonal line math that advances from bottom-right to top-left as progress increases.

nodes.name: vwave_crossfade.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for a vertical sine-wave warp crossfade. Applies a horizontal sinusoidal displacement (scaled by a triangle envelope) to smoothly warp and blend the old and new scenes during transition.

nodes.name: zigzag_crossfade.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for a zigzag/horizontal wave crossfade. Applies a vertical sine-wave displacement along the x-axis that is strongest at mid-transition, producing a zigzag distortion while blending scenes. FIXME note: only crunches the y-axis unlike SACT2.dll.

nodes.name: fill.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Minimal fragment shader that fills every pixel with a single uniform solid color. Used for rectangle and solid-fill drawing operations in the 2D rendering pipeline.

nodes.name: fill_amap_gradation_ud.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for a top-to-bottom alpha gradient fill. Samples a texture's RGB but replaces its alpha with a value linearly interpolated between two threshold uniforms along the y-axis (gradation up-down).

nodes.name: fill_amap_over_border.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader that outputs a uniform color for pixels whose source texture alpha exceeds a threshold, and discards (clips) pixels below the threshold. Used for alpha-map over-border masking.

nodes.name: fill_amap_under_border.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader that outputs a uniform color for pixels whose source texture alpha is below a threshold, discarding pixels above. Inverse of fill_amap_over_border; used for alpha-map under-border masking.

nodes.name: fill_angle.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader that fills a circular sector/wedge with a uniform color. Uses atan2 to compute per-pixel angle relative to a center point, discarding pixels outside the specified angular sweep starting from start_angle.

nodes.name: hitbox.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for hitbox visualization with alpha-blended rectangle clipping. Renders a texture within a bot_left/top_right bounding rectangle and outputs zero alpha outside, preserving texture alpha inside.

nodes.name: hitbox_noblend.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for hitbox rendering without alpha blending. Same rect-clip logic as hitbox.f.glsl but forces alpha=1.0 inside the bounding rectangle, producing fully opaque output for no-blend hitbox detection.

nodes.name: movie.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for YCbCr video playback. Samples three separate planar textures (Y, Cb, Cr) and converts them to RGBA using the BT.601 color matrix, enabling hardware-accelerated video decoding output.

nodes.name: parts.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for the core 2D sprite/parts rendering. Applies texture sampling with additive+multiplicative color modulation, blend_rate alpha scaling, rect clipping, and optional clipper texture masking for the System4 parts engine.

nodes.name: parts.v.glsl
nodes.summary: Vertex shader for the 2D parts/sprite pipeline. Transforms vertex positions through world and view matrices, passes UV coordinates as tex_coord, and computes clip_coord via the inverse clipper transform for the clipper masking in parts.f.glsl.

nodes.name: reign.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Full-featured fragment shader for the REIGN 3D engine. Supports diffuse/emissive/lightmap/envmap diffuse modes, normal mapping, specular highlights, rim lighting, PCF shadow mapping (9-sample), linear/light-scattering fog, and multiple alpha modes (blend/test/map). Conditionally compiled for REIGN_ENGINE vs simpler path.

nodes.name: reign.v.glsl
nodes.summary: Vertex shader for the REIGN 3D engine. Handles skinned mesh animation (up to 308 bones, 4 weights), tangent-space normal mapping, shadow map projection, UV scrolling, and light-scattering fog pre-computation. Conditionally compiled for REIGN_ENGINE vs simpler path.

nodes.name: reign_outline.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Minimal fragment shader for 3D outline/silhouette rendering in the REIGN engine. Outputs a uniform outline_color for all fragments, used in the outline pass drawn with expanded vertex normals.

nodes.name: reign_outline.v.glsl
nodes.summary: Vertex shader for REIGN 3D outline/silhouette pass. Expands vertices along their world-space normals by outline_thickness before projecting, supporting full skeletal bone deformation (308 bones) to produce a cel-shaded outline effect.

nodes.name: reign_shadow.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Fragment shader for shadow map generation in the REIGN engine. Writes normalized depth (gl_FragCoord.z scaled to 0-65535) to a uint render target for high-precision shadow depth storage.

nodes.name: reign_shadow.v.glsl
nodes.summary: Vertex shader for shadow map generation in the REIGN engine. Transforms skinned mesh vertices (up to 308 bones) into light-space clip coordinates using local and view transforms, feeding the shadow map depth pass.

nodes.name: render.f.glsl
nodes.summary: Minimal pass-through fragment shader. Samples a single texture and outputs its RGBA directly; used as the final blit/composite shader for rendering a framebuffer texture to screen.

nodes.name: sprite.f.glsl
nodes.summary: OpenGL fragment shader for SACT sprite rendering. Samples a 2D texture (tex), multiplies RGB channels by a per-sprite multiply_color tint, and scales the alpha channel by blend_rate (0.0–1.0). This is the simplest sprite shader in the engine — no additive-colour or parts-panel logic — paired with render.v.glsl and loaded exclusively by src/sprite.c.

nodes.name: render.v.glsl
nodes.summary: Generic OpenGL vertex shader used as the vertex stage for the sprite shader program. Transforms vertex positions with world and view matrices and passes UV coordinates through to the fragment stage.

nodes.summary: Renders one frame of the 3D dungeon: wall/floor/ceiling geometry, animated markers, polyobjects, and skybox.

nodes.name: marker_info
nodes.summary: Describes a floor event marker: event type code, DTX texture index/count, and floor marker variant enum.

nodes.name: skybox.c
nodes.summary: Skybox renderer using an OpenGL cubemap texture assembled from 6 DTX face images. Renders before geometry with depth test LEQUAL.

nodes.name: skybox_create
nodes.summary: Creates the skybox VAO, uploads 6 cubemap face textures from the DTX archive, and compiles the skybox shader.

nodes.name: skybox_free
nodes.summary: Deletes all OpenGL skybox resources (VAO, buffers, texture, shader program).

nodes.name: skybox_render
nodes.summary: Draws the skybox cube with the cubemap texture using the view+projection transforms.

nodes.name: skybox
nodes.summary: Holds shader, uniform locations, VAO/buffer IDs, cubemap texture handle, and index count for the skybox mesh.

nodes.name: tes.c
nodes.summary: Parser for TES (Texture Entries / tile-set) binary files used to describe dungeon texture mappings.

nodes.name: tes_parse
nodes.summary: Reads a TES binary blob, validates magic header, and allocates a tes struct with nr_columns x nr_rows entry array.

nodes.name: tes_free
nodes.summary: Frees entries array and tes struct.

nodes.name: effect.c
nodes.summary: Screen transition effects system. Manages 50+ named effects ranging from crossfades to TV-off simulations, dispatching to either GLSL shader pipelines or CPU blending routines.

nodes.name: effect_init
nodes.summary: Begins a transition effect: captures current framebuffer, sets view texture, and lazily loads the shader.

nodes.name: effect_update
nodes.summary: Updates effect progress for a given rate [0,1]: blends old and new surfaces or runs the GLSL shader.

nodes.name: effect_fini
nodes.summary: Terminates an active effect and resets the view surface.

nodes.name: effect_update_texture
nodes.summary: Stateless version: applies an effect transformation directly to a destination texture given old/new surfaces and a rate.

nodes.name: load_effect_shader
nodes.summary: Lazily loads and links the GLSL fragment shader for a given effect_shader descriptor.

nodes.name: render_effect_shader
nodes.summary: Renders one frame of a shader-based effect to dst texture using the old/new surfaces and progress uniform.

nodes.name: effect_shader
nodes.summary: Wraps a Shader with cached uniform locations (old, resolution, progress) and the GLSL fragment shader file path.

nodes.name: ffi.c
nodes.summary: Foreign Function Interface layer bridging the AIN VM to C HLL libraries using libffi. Handles argument marshalling for all System 4 v14 type variants (wrap, iface, option, ref, hll_func) and implements optional call tracing.

nodes.name: hll_call
nodes.summary: Main HLL dispatch: pops typed arguments from the VM stack, marshals them to libffi, calls the C function, and pushes the return value.

nodes.name: library_exists
nodes.summary: Returns whether the library slot at libno has been registered.

nodes.name: library_function_exists
nodes.summary: Returns whether a specific function within a library has a bound C function pointer.

nodes.name: print_hll_trace
nodes.summary: Formats and prints a detailed HLL call trace including argument names, values, and return value.

nodes.name: trace_hll_call
nodes.summary: Conditionally invokes print_hll_trace based on per-library trace filter callbacks.

nodes.name: font_fnl.c
nodes.summary: FNL bitmap font backend. Implements the font_vtable using pre-rendered 1-bit bitmap glyphs stored in AliceSoft FNL archives, with downscaling by integer denominators.

nodes.name: fnl_font_load
nodes.summary: Loads an FNL font from a library, initializes bitmap sizes and downscaled size variants, and wires up vtable pointers.

nodes.name: fnl_font_get_glyph
nodes.summary: Retrieves a glyph at a given codepoint and weight: downsamples the full-size bitmap by the size denominator and uploads to an RMAP texture.

nodes.name: fnl_get_bitmap_glyph
nodes.summary: Expands the 1-bit FNL bitmap for a glyph index into an 8-bit pixel buffer, caching the result.

nodes.name: fnl_font_get_size
nodes.summary: Returns the font_size closest to the requested pixel size (nearest match).

nodes.name: font_fnl
nodes.summary: FNL font instance extending font super-struct with FNL lib pointer, bitmap sizes, and scaled size variants.

nodes.name: fnl_bitmap_size
nodes.summary: Holds a face pointer and lazily-populated glyph pixel buffer array for one bitmap size.

nodes.name: font_freetype.c
nodes.summary: FreeType2 scalable font backend. Renders glyphs on demand, handles bold embolden, GRAY/MONO pixel modes, kerning, and half-width detection for SJIS font metrics.

nodes.name: ft_font_init
nodes.summary: Initializes the global FreeType library instance.

nodes.name: ft_font_load
nodes.summary: Loads a TTF/OTF font file (or Android asset), verifies charmap presence, and wires vtable.

nodes.name: ft_font_get_glyph
nodes.summary: Renders a glyph via FreeType, optionally embolds it, converts MONO to GRAY, and uploads to a block-sized texture.

nodes.name: init_glyph_texture
nodes.summary: Converts a FreeType bitmap into a padded block-size texture, accounting for bitmap offsets and half-width variants.

nodes.name: ft_font_size_char_kerning
nodes.summary: Returns the advance width for a character plus FreeType kerning adjustment to the next character.

nodes.name: font_ft
nodes.summary: FreeType font instance extending font super-struct with FT_Face, current pixel size, and dynamically-added size entries.

nodes.name: format.c
nodes.summary: AIN string format specifier engine. Implements %d, %f, %s, %c, %b format codes with padding, zero-padding, precision, and full-width (zenkaku) digit/float variants.

nodes.name: string_format
nodes.summary: Top-level formatter: scans a format string for the first matching %spec, applies the format to vm_value arg, and returns a new string.

nodes.name: parse_fmt_spec
nodes.summary: Parses a percent-prefixed format specifier into a fmt_spec struct, validating type compatibility with the vm_value type.

nodes.name: append_fmt
nodes.summary: Serializes a vm_value into the appropriate string representation based on the parsed fmt_spec.

nodes.name: fmt_spec
nodes.summary: Parsed format specifier holding type enum, precision, padding, zero_pad flag, and zenkaku (full-width) flag.

nodes.name: hacks.c
nodes.summary: Game-specific compatibility hacks. Patches AIN bytecode at startup for Rance 02 font width, Daibanchou English detection, and sets game flags for runtime behavior differences.

nodes.name: apply_game_specific_hacks
nodes.summary: Entry point: identifies the loaded game by name and library presence, then dispatches to the appropriate per-game hack function.

nodes.name: apply_rance02_hacks
nodes.summary: Rewrites the _CalculateWidth AIN function to use a font-generic proportional width calculation for Rance 02 (MG).

nodes.name: set_msgskip_delay
nodes.summary: Injects an AIN wrapper around function 'A' to add a configurable delay when CTRL is held during message skip.

nodes.name: heap.c
nodes.summary: VM heap memory manager. Implements slot-based reference-counted storage for pages and strings, mmap virtual reservation for zero-copy growth, mark-and-sweep cycle GC with type-aware struct scanning and generation counters.

nodes.name: heap_init
nodes.summary: Initializes the heap using mmap reservation (48 GB virtual) or malloc fallback, builds the free-list from slot 2 onward.

nodes.name: heap_grow
nodes.summary: Extends the heap array (mmap: into reserved space; malloc: realloc), zero-initializes new slots, and chains them into the free list.

nodes.name: heap_gc
nodes.summary: Full mark-and-sweep GC: marks roots from global page, call stack, and value stack; sweeps unmarked live slots freeing cycle garbage.

nodes.name: heap_gc_periodic
nodes.summary: Public GC trigger: runs heap_gc when free slots drop below 10% of heap size and GC is not inhibited.

nodes.name: gc_scan_page
nodes.summary: Precise type-aware page scanner: uses struct refmaps or conservative scanning to push referenced child slots onto the BFS work stack.

nodes.name: gc_mark_slot
nodes.summary: Iterative BFS marker: marks a slot and recursively marks all reachable VM_PAGE children via work stack.

nodes.name: gc_get_struct_refmap
nodes.summary: Returns or builds a per-struct-type byte bitmap indicating which member slots hold heap references.

nodes.name: gc_init_struct_cache
nodes.summary: Allocates the gc_struct_refmap array sized to ain->nr_structures on first GC invocation.

nodes.name: icon.c
nodes.summary: Windows PE/ICO resource parser used to extract the application icon from the game's EXE for use as the SDL window icon.

nodes.name: load_icon_from_exe
nodes.summary: Navigates the PE resource directory of the game EXE to find the first RT_ICON entry and decode it as an SDL surface.

nodes.name: id_pool.c
nodes.summary: Generic integer-indexed object pool backed by a growable pointer array. Provides base-offset IDs, get/set/release operations, and iteration helpers.

nodes.name: id_pool_init
nodes.summary: Allocates the slot array with an initial capacity of 32 and records the base offset.

nodes.name: id_pool_delete
nodes.summary: Frees the slot array and resets pool metadata.

nodes.name: id_pool_get_unused
nodes.summary: Returns the first free slot ID, growing the array if necessary.

nodes.name: id_pool_set
nodes.summary: Stores a pointer at the given ID, growing the array if needed. Returns the previous value.

nodes.name: id_pool_release
nodes.summary: Clears a slot by ID and returns the old pointer.

nodes.name: input.c
nodes.summary: SDL input event handling: keyboard, mouse, joystick/gamepad, touch events. Translates SDL scancodes to SACT VK codes, synthesizes mouse events from touch, and dispatches to the scene manager.

nodes.name: handle_events
nodes.summary: Main SDL event pump: processes all pending events (keyboard, mouse, window, joystick, touch, finger) and invokes scene callbacks.

nodes.name: key_is_down
nodes.summary: Returns the current pressed state for a SACT virtual key code.

nodes.name: key_clear_flag
nodes.summary: Clears all key state flags, optionally preserving CTRL state.

nodes.name: mouse_get_pos
nodes.summary: Converts SDL window mouse position to game coordinate space accounting for the viewport offset and scale.

nodes.name: mouse_set_pos
nodes.summary: Warps the OS mouse cursor to a game-space position.

nodes.name: joyaxis_update
nodes.summary: Updates joystick axis virtual key states with hysteresis and cooldown timers.

nodes.name: json.c
nodes.summary: JSON serialization helpers for engine state export (debugger, dashboard). Converts textures, sprites, text styles, colors, and geometric types to cJSON objects.

nodes.name: sprite_to_json
nodes.summary: Serializes a full sact_sprite to a cJSON tree including texture, colors, blend rate, text, and draw plugin.

nodes.name: texture_to_json_with_pixels
nodes.summary: Encodes texture pixel data as base64 and embeds it in the texture JSON object.

nodes.name: text_style_to_json
nodes.summary: Serializes a text_style struct (face, size, bold, edge, color, scale) to cJSON.

nodes.name: meson.build
nodes.summary: Meson build definition for the xsystem4 core source tree. Lists all C source files, optional FFmpeg/plmpeg/FreeType/FNL dependencies, and HLL module sources.

nodes.name: movie_ffmpeg.c
nodes.summary: FFmpeg-based movie decoder. Runs a background demuxer/decoder thread, synchronizes audio to video via stream timestamps, and blits YUV frames to an RGBA texture via libswscale.

nodes.name: movie_open
nodes.summary: Opens a video file with FFmpeg, initializes audio/video decoders and queues, starts the decoder thread, and registers the audio stream with the mixer.

nodes.name: movie_update
nodes.summary: Called each frame to check if a decoded video frame is ready, convert YUV to RGBA, and upload to the sprite texture.

nodes.name: movie_close
nodes.summary: Signals the decoder thread to stop, joins it, frees all FFmpeg and SDL resources.

nodes.name: init_decoder
nodes.summary: Initializes an AVCodecContext for either audio or video stream and allocates packet queue.

nodes.name: free_decoder
nodes.summary: Frees codec context, frame, and packet FIFO for a decoder.

nodes.name: movie_context
nodes.summary: Holds all state for an active FFmpeg movie: format context, audio/video decoders, SWS converter, sts_mixer stream, timing data, and mutexes.

nodes.name: decoder
nodes.summary: Per-stream decoder state: AVStream, AVCodecContext, AVFrame, and packet FIFO queue.

nodes.name: movie_plmpeg.c
nodes.summary: pl_mpeg based MPEG1/MP2 movie decoder. Single-threaded decoder with audio callbacks to sts_mixer, YCbCr-to-RGBA via custom GLSL shader, and mutex-protected timing.

nodes.name: movie_open
nodes.summary: Opens a .mpg file with pl_mpeg, initializes YCbCr texture triplet, sets up sts_mixer audio stream.

nodes.name: movie_update
nodes.summary: Checks stream timestamp vs wall clock to decode and upload the next video frame via GLSL YCbCr shader.

nodes.name: movie_close
nodes.summary: Stops sts_mixer voice, destroys plm context, frees YCbCr textures and mutexes.

nodes.name: audio_callback
nodes.summary: sts_mixer stream callback: decodes the next audio frame from plm, updates timing.

nodes.name: movie_context
nodes.summary: pl_mpeg movie state: plm handle, decoder mutex, pending video frame, YCbCr GL textures, sts_mixer stream, timing data.

nodes.name: msgqueue.c
nodes.summary: Thread-safe FIFO message queue using SDL mutexes and condition variables, used for inter-thread communication in the movie decoder.

nodes.name: msgq_new
nodes.summary: Allocates and initializes a msgq with a mutex and condition variable.

nodes.name: msgq_free
nodes.summary: Destroys the mutex and condition, frees the queue.

nodes.name: msgq_enqueue
nodes.summary: Appends a message pointer to the tail of the queue and signals the nonempty condition.

nodes.name: msgq_dequeue
nodes.summary: Blocks until a message is available, removes it from the head, and returns the pointer.

nodes.name: msgq_dequeue_timeout
nodes.summary: Like msgq_dequeue but returns NULL if no message arrives within timeout_ms milliseconds.

nodes.name: page.c
nodes.summary: VM page allocator with per-size free-list caches. Manages page lifecycle (alloc/free/init/fini), variable initialization by AIN type, array type deduction, and struct member analysis for v14 wrap/inheritance.

nodes.name: _alloc_page
nodes.summary: Allocates a page from the per-size cache (up to NR_CACHES=64 vars) or falls back to xcalloc.

nodes.name: free_page
nodes.summary: Returns a page to the per-size cache or frees it directly if the cache is full.

nodes.name: alloc_page
nodes.summary: Allocates and initializes a page with type, type_index, and nr_vars.

nodes.name: variable_initval
nodes.summary: Returns the default vm_value for a given AIN data type, allocating heap slots for reference types.

nodes.name: variable_fini
nodes.summary: Releases a variable's heap slot (string/struct/delegate/array etc.) on variable destruction.

nodes.name: array_type
nodes.summary: Returns the element AIN type for a typed array type enum value.

nodes.name: alloc_struct
nodes.summary: Allocates and fully initializes a struct page: allocates heap slot, initializes all member variables.

nodes.name: copy_page
nodes.summary: Deep-copies a page: allocates new heap slots for reference-type members and increments refcounts for string/struct members.

nodes.name: resume.c
nodes.summary: VM state serialization for resume (mid-session save). Converts the live heap and call stack to JSON for save-state snapshots and restores them on load.

nodes.name: resume_save
nodes.summary: Serializes the complete VM heap, call stack, and global page to a JSON resume file.

nodes.name: resume_load
nodes.summary: Deserializes a JSON resume file, reconstructs all heap pages/strings, and restores the call stack.

nodes.name: resume_page_to_json
nodes.summary: Converts a single page (type, subtype, values) to a cJSON object.

nodes.name: heap_item_to_json
nodes.summary: Converts one heap slot (ref count, type, content) to a cJSON array entry.

nodes.name: savedata.c
nodes.summary: AliceSoft GSAVE/LSAVE savedata serialization. Reads and writes per-global-group save files in gsave/lsave binary format and JSON, including flat-array collection and deep struct/array traversal.

nodes.name: save_json
nodes.summary: Writes a cJSON tree to a file in the save directory.

nodes.name: load_json
nodes.summary: Reads and parses a cJSON document from the save directory.

nodes.name: save_globals
nodes.summary: Serializes all global variables to their respective GSAVE/LSAVE group files.

nodes.name: load_globals
nodes.summary: Deserializes all saved global groups and restores global page variable values.

nodes.name: collect_flat_arrays
nodes.summary: Recursively collects multi-dimensional array pages into a flat gsave_flat_array list.

nodes.name: scene.c
nodes.summary: Scene graph manager: maintains a z-ordered sprite list (TAILQ), deferred sort, wallpaper (WP) texture, and the per-frame render loop that calls sprite render callbacks.

nodes.name: screenshot.c
nodes.summary: Platform-specific screenshot capture using zenity (Linux), Windows OPENFILENAME dialog, or a stub (Android). Saves the main GL surface as a PNG to disk.

nodes.name: sprite.c
nodes.summary: SACT2/ChipmunkSpriteEngine sprite system: texture management, CG loading, OpenGL shader setup (SACT/chipmunk), text rendering overlay, plugin dispatch, draw-method blending (normal/screen/multiply/additive).

nodes.name: swf.c
nodes.summary: SWF/AFF file parser: reads Flash SWF tag lists and ActionScript action lists. Supports DefineBitsLossless (zlib), DefineSprite, DefineSound, PlaceObject2/3, DoAction, and decrypts/decompresses AliceSoft AFF container format.

nodes.name: system4.c
nodes.summary: Main entry point: parses CLI options (--font-*, --audit, --skip-title, etc.), reads System40.ini / AliceStart.ini config, loads .ain file, initialises subsystems, calls vm_execute_ain. Also contains ain_audit() for compatibility checking.

nodes.name: text.c
nodes.summary: Font and text rendering: loads TTF / FNL fonts, manages glyph cache (hashtable), implements SACT2 stateless API (gfx_render_text) and DrawGraph stateful API (gfx_setfont_*, gfx_draw_text_to_*). Handles SJIS/Unicode, bold/edge/outline styles.

nodes.name: util.c
nodes.summary: Utility helpers: SJIS<->UTF display conversion (display_sjis0/1/2, display_utf0/1/2), path resolution (gamedir_path, savedir_path), date/time accessors, indent_message, log_message (DAP-aware).

nodes.name: version.h.in
nodes.summary: Meson template that generates version.h containing the XSYSTEM4_VERSION string.

nodes.name: video.c
nodes.summary: OpenGL/SDL video backend: window creation, GL context, shader loading/linking, VAO/VBO/IBO setup, viewport scaling (letterbox/pillarbox), texture creation/deletion, framebuffer management, gfx_swap (flip + auto-screenshot), pixel readback, macOS NSApplication activation and Sequoia SwiftUI workarounds.

nodes.name: vm.c
nodes.summary: Core bytecode virtual machine (~5000 lines): executes AliceSoft .ain bytecode. Implements the full opcode set (stack ops, arithmetic, control flow, CALLFUNC/CALLMETHOD/CALLHLL/DG_CALL, NEW/DELETE, system calls). Manages call stack (4096 frames), v14 2-slot type dispatch (OPTION/WRAP/IFACE), delegate call protocol, lambda closure propagation, CASTimer native interception, skip-title optimisation, heartbeat event pump, and periodic GC. Entry via vm_execute_ain().

nodes.name: sprite_list
nodes.summary: TAILQ (BSD tail-queue) of struct sprite pointers; the global scene graph. Sorted lazily by (z, z2) before each render frame.

nodes.name: sprite_shader
nodes.summary: Static struct holding the compiled GLSL shader (program, uniform locations) for SACT2 and ChipmunkSpriteEngine sprites. Shared by all sact_sprite instances.

nodes.name: bit_reader
nodes.summary: Bit-level reader used to parse SWF variable-length bitfield structures (RECT, MATRIX, CXFORM). Wraps a buffer pointer with a one-byte lookahead.

nodes.name: config
nodes.summary: Global config struct: game name, AIN path, view dimensions, mixer channels, font paths, save directory, skip-title flag, text x-scale, etc. Populated from System40.ini + .xsys4rc + CLI arguments.

nodes.name: font_metrics
nodes.summary: Stateful DrawGraph font context: size, face (gothic/mincho), weight, underline, strikeout, char spacing, color. Mutated by gfx_setfont_* calls.

nodes.name: function_call
nodes.summary: Call-stack frame: fno, call/return address, local page_slot, struct_page, base_sp (stack balance), is_method, is_delegate_call, env_page for closures.

nodes.name: cas_timers
nodes.summary: Native CASTimer array (2048 entries): CLOCK_MONOTONIC epoch + active flag. Bypasses broken CASTimerManager struct pages in v14 games.

nodes.name: sdl_private
nodes.summary: Global SDL state: window, GL context, VAO/VBO/IBO handles, pixel format, viewport rectangle, logical size (w/h). Referenced throughout the gfx layer.

nodes.name: sprite_z_compare
nodes.summary: qsort comparator for sprites: primary key z, secondary key z2.

nodes.name: sprite_list_ensure_sorted
nodes.summary: Deferred sort: collects TAILQ into a temporary array, qsorts by (z,z2), rebuilds TAILQ in order. Only runs when sprite_list_unsorted flag is set.

nodes.name: scene_register_sprite
nodes.summary: Adds a sprite to the scene TAILQ, assigning an id if needed, marks list unsorted.

nodes.name: scene_render
nodes.summary: Frame render: clears GL surface, renders wallpaper texture, ensures sort, then calls render() callback on each sprite in z order.

nodes.name: scene_set_wp
nodes.summary: Sets the scene wallpaper to a CG asset (cg_no=0 clears it).

nodes.name: scene_to_json
nodes.summary: Serialises the sprite list to a cJSON array for debugging.

nodes.name: screenshot_save
nodes.summary: Platform-specific screenshot: Linux uses zenity file-selector or default path; Windows uses OPENFILENAME dialog; Android is a stub. Saves PNG via gfx_save_texture.

nodes.name: zenity_get_filename
nodes.summary: Spawns zenity --file-selection to get a save path from the user.

nodes.name: sprite_init
nodes.summary: Zeroes a sact_sprite and sets default blend_rate=255 and white multiply_color.

nodes.name: sprite_free
nodes.summary: Unregisters sprite from scene, deletes textures, calls plugin->free, resets to default state.

nodes.name: prepare_sact_shader
nodes.summary: OpenGL uniform upload for SACT2 shader: blend_rate and multiply_color.

nodes.name: prepare_chipmunk_shader
nodes.summary: OpenGL uniform upload for ChipmunkSpriteEngine shader: blend_rate, multiply_color, add_color, surface clipper.

nodes.name: sprite_init_sact
nodes.summary: Loads SACT2 GLSL shaders (render.v / sprite.f) and grabs uniform locations.

nodes.name: sprite_init_chipmunk
nodes.summary: Loads ChipmunkSpriteEngine shaders (parts.v / parts.f), grabs uniform locations including add_color / clipper.

nodes.name: sprite_render
nodes.summary: Renders a sact_sprite: calls plugin render if present, else applies GL blend func per draw_method, renders main + text texture overlays via sprite_shader.

nodes.name: sprite_set_cg
nodes.summary: Replaces sprite texture with a CG image; updates rect dimensions and has_alpha flag.

nodes.name: sprite_set_cg_2x
nodes.summary: Loads CG at 1x then stretch-copies to a 2x texture (used in Rance VI English port).

nodes.name: sprite_text_draw
nodes.summary: Renders text string onto the sprite's overlay texture using the given text_style.

nodes.name: sprite_is_point_in
nodes.summary: Hit-test: checks rect containment then samples alpha channel from GL texture.

nodes.name: sprite_bind_plugin
nodes.summary: Attaches or detaches a draw_plugin to a sprite; manages the global sprites_with_plugins list.

nodes.name: sprite_call_plugins
nodes.summary: Iterates sprites_with_plugins list and calls plugin->update() on each.

nodes.name: swf_free
nodes.summary: Recursively frees a parsed SWF structure and all its tags/actions.

nodes.name: read_unsigned_bits
nodes.summary: Reads up to 32 bits from a bit_reader, consuming bytes from the buffer as needed.

nodes.name: read_signed_bits
nodes.summary: Sign-extends read_unsigned_bits for signed SWF integer fields.

nodes.name: parse_swf_matrix
nodes.summary: Parses SWF MATRIX record (scale, rotate, translate) from bitfield format.

nodes.name: parse_define_bits_lossless
nodes.summary: Decompresses zlib pixel data and converts (A)RGB -> RGBA for DefineBitsLossless/2 tags.

nodes.name: parse_define_shape
nodes.summary: Parses DefineShape tag: reads fill styles, validates single-rectangle shape, reads StyleChangeRecord + four StraightEdgeRecords.

nodes.name: parse_tag
nodes.summary: Dispatches a single SWF tag to its type-specific parser based on tag code.

nodes.name: parse_tag_list
nodes.summary: Builds a linked list of parsed SWF tags by calling parse_tag until buffer exhausted.

nodes.name: parse_action_push
nodes.summary: Parses ActionPush records (INTEGER / CONSTANT8 types), dynamically resizing the values array.

nodes.name: swf_load
nodes.summary: Validates 'FWS' magic, reads SWF header (version, file_length, frame_size/rate/count), then parses the root tag list.

nodes.name: aff_load
nodes.summary: Loads AliceSoft AFF container: validates header, XOR-decrypts first 64 bytes with aff_mask, decompresses CWS to FWS, then calls swf_load.

nodes.name: read_config
nodes.summary: Parses System40.ini / AliceStart.ini: extracts GameName, CodeName, ViewWidth/Height, VolumeValancer, DefaultVolumeRate, UseJoypad into the global config struct.

nodes.name: read_user_config_file
nodes.summary: Parses .xsys4rc: font-mincho/gothic/fnl paths, font-x-scale, msgskip-delay, save-folder, save-format (json/rsm).

nodes.name: read_mixer_channels
nodes.summary: Parses VolumeValancer list from INI: handles null, string, or [name, volume] pairs.

nodes.name: ain_audit
nodes.summary: Walks the entire .ain bytecode and reports unimplemented opcodes, syscalls, and HLL library functions to stdout.

nodes.name: get_xsystem4_home
nodes.summary: Resolves xsystem4 home directory from XSYSTEM4_HOME env, XDG_DATA_HOME/xsystem4, $HOME/.xsystem4, or cwd as fallback.

nodes.name: config_init_with_ini
nodes.summary: Loads config from a specific .ini path; sets game_dir to the ini's directory.

nodes.name: config_init_with_dir
nodes.summary: Searches a directory for System40.ini or AliceStart.ini and calls config_init_with_ini.

nodes.name: sigsegv_handler
nodes.summary: SIGSEGV/SIGBUS handler: writes crash marker to stderr, dumps backtrace, re-raises with default handler.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Program entry: installs signal handlers, parses CLI options (getopt_long), resolves game config from ini/dir/ain path, loads .ain, optionally audits, then calls vm_execute_ain to start the engine.

nodes.name: error_handler
nodes.summary: Custom system error handler: suppresses SDL_ShowSimpleMessageBox to avoid blocking in non-interactive environments.

nodes.name: usage
nodes.summary: Prints CLI usage/help text to stdout.

nodes.name: gfx_font_init
nodes.summary: One-time font subsystem init: calls ft_font_init, loads gothic+mincho TTF fonts, optionally loads FNL font library.

nodes.name: load_font
nodes.summary: Loads a TTF font by trying: user config path, installed XSYS4_DATA_DIR path, local path.

nodes.name: font_get_glyph
nodes.summary: Returns a cached glyph texture from the hashtable, rendering it on first access.

nodes.name: _gfx_render_text
nodes.summary: Core glyph-by-glyph renderer: iterates SJIS string, fetches glyphs, dispatches to COPY/BLENDED/PMAP/AMAP render modes, applies edge spacing, x-scale.

nodes.name: gfx_render_textf
nodes.summary: High-level text renderer: computes edge width, renders edge pass then core pass, returns total pixel advance as float.

nodes.name: gfx_render_text
nodes.summary: Wrapper around gfx_render_textf returning integer pixel advance.

nodes.name: gfx_render_dash_text
nodes.summary: Renders a horizontal dash/line as a glyph substitute (for em-dashes in certain games).

nodes.name: gfx_size_text
nodes.summary: Measures total pixel width of an SJIS string without rendering.

nodes.name: gfx_int_to_font_weight
nodes.summary: Maps AliceSoft integer weight (0-9999) to FONT_WEIGHT_NORMAL/BOLD/HEAVY enum.

nodes.name: gfx_set_font_name
nodes.summary: Parses SJIS font name strings (MS Mincho / MS Gothic) to set font_metrics.face.

nodes.name: gfx_draw_text
nodes.summary: Internal DrawGraph text renderer: builds text_render_metrics from font_metrics state, dispatches to _gfx_render_text.

nodes.name: display_sjis0
nodes.summary: Converts SJIS string to display encoding (UTF-8 on non-Windows, pass-through on Windows). Static buffer.

nodes.name: unix_path
nodes.summary: Converts SJIS path to UTF-8 and replaces backslashes with forward slashes.

nodes.name: gamedir_path
nodes.summary: Resolves a game-relative or absolute path against config.game_dir.

nodes.name: savedir_path
nodes.summary: Resolves a path against config.save_dir.

nodes.name: get_date
nodes.summary: Returns current date (year/month/mday/wday) from localtime.

nodes.name: get_time
nodes.summary: Returns current time (hour/min/sec/ms) using localtime + clock_gettime.

nodes.name: log_message
nodes.summary: Logs a message: routes to DAP dbg_dap_log when DAP mode active, else sys_vmessage.

nodes.name: gfx_init
nodes.summary: Full graphics subsystem init: SDL_Init, macOS NSApplication activation, GL context creation, GLEW init, gl_initialize, gfx_draw_init, logical size, window sizing, icon. Idempotent. macOS Sequoia SwiftUI workaround included.

nodes.name: gfx_fini
nodes.summary: Cleanup: deletes default shader program, destroys SDL window, frees pixel format, calls SDL_Quit.

nodes.name: gl_initialize
nodes.summary: Post-context GL setup: loads render shaders, creates VAO/VBO/IBO for rect/line/quad, enables blending, sets unpack alignment, queries max texture size.

nodes.name: gfx_load_shader_file
nodes.summary: Loads a GLSL file (local or XSYS4_DATA_DIR), prepends GLSL preamble + defines, compiles and returns shader ID. Errors on compile failure.

nodes.name: gfx_load_shader
nodes.summary: Links vertex + fragment shaders into a program; stores program + standard uniform/attrib locations.

nodes.name: gfx_set_window_logical_size
nodes.summary: Sets logical render dimensions, updates world_view_transform ortho matrix, calls main_surface_init.

nodes.name: gfx_update_screen_scale
nodes.summary: Computes letterbox/pillarbox viewport rectangle to fit logical size into display size.

nodes.name: gfx_swap
nodes.summary: Presents the frame: binds default FBO, clears, renders main_surface texture, calls glFinish (macOS crash fix), SDL_GL_SwapWindow, rebinds FBO, updates frame rate counter. Includes auto-screenshot debug feature.

nodes.name: gfx_render
nodes.summary: Executes a gfx_render_job: calls gfx_prepare_job (uniforms, texture bind) then gfx_run_job (draw call).

nodes.name: gfx_prepare_job
nodes.summary: Sets up shader uniforms for a render job: world/view transforms, texture sampler, optional custom prepare.

nodes.name: gfx_run_job
nodes.summary: Issues the GL draw call for a render job: binds VAO/VBO/IBO, calls glDrawElements.

nodes.name: _gfx_render_texture
nodes.summary: Renders a texture at a given rectangle using a specified shader; computes world transform.

nodes.name: gfx_render_quadrilateral
nodes.summary: Renders a texture onto an arbitrary quad (normalises UV coordinates, uploads to quad_vbo).

nodes.name: gfx_init_texture_rgba
nodes.summary: Creates an RGBA GL texture filled with a solid color (CPU fill, then upload to avoid slow FBO on macOS).

nodes.name: gfx_init_texture_rgb
nodes.summary: Creates an RGB GL texture filled with a solid color.

nodes.name: gfx_get_pixel
nodes.summary: Reads a single RGBA pixel from a texture via FBO + glReadPixels.

nodes.name: gfx_save_texture
nodes.summary: Reads all pixels from a texture and writes to file using cg_write (PNG/QNT).

nodes.name: gfx_set_framebuffer
nodes.summary: Creates and binds an FBO targeting a texture for off-screen rendering.

nodes.name: gfx_clear
nodes.summary: Clears the GL color buffer with the current clear_color.

nodes.name: init_func_flags
nodes.summary: Pre-computes per-function bitflags (LAMBDA, CDEBUG, CASTIMER_MGR/INST, SKIP_TITLE) to avoid repeated strstr in hot paths.

nodes.name: native_cas_timer_intercept
nodes.summary: Intercepts CASTimerManager/CASTimer method calls with native CLOCK_MONOTONIC implementation, bypassing broken v14 struct pages. Handles CreateHandle, GetObject, Get, GetScaled, Reset, Rate.

nodes.name: stack_pop
nodes.summary: Pops the VM stack with underflow protection: returns zero value and logs warning on underflow.

nodes.name: stack_pop_var
nodes.summary: Pops a 2-slot (heap_index, page_index) reference off the stack; returns pointer to the referenced page slot with safety checks. Returns dummy_var on invalid access.

nodes.name: stack_push_string
nodes.summary: Allocates a heap string slot, marks it as HEAP_TEMP_FLAG (stack-owned), and pushes the slot index.

nodes.name: vm_copy
nodes.summary: Deep-copies a vm_value according to its AIN type: string->heap_ref, struct/array/delegate->copy_page, v14 wrap/option/iface->copy_page, REF_TYPE->heap_ref.

nodes.name: global_set
nodes.summary: Sets a global variable: unrefs old heap slot for string/struct/array types before assigning.

nodes.name: _function_call
nodes.summary: Core function invocation: validates fno/address/nr_vars, allocates local page, pushes call-stack frame, jumps IP to function entry. Includes C-stack overflow guard, call-stack overflow guard, debug tracing.

nodes.name: function_call
nodes.summary: Calls _function_call then pops arguments from the VM stack into the local page, handling ref-counting per argument type (string temp-flag, ref-types heap_ref). Propagates lambda closure struct_page from enclosing frame.

nodes.name: method_call
nodes.summary: Invokes function_call then sets the struct_page frame field from the stack. v14: handles CDebug skip, CASTimer native intercept, wrap-unwrap, auto-alloc null struct. Pre-v14: pops struct_page and validates STRUCT_PAGE type.

nodes.name: delegate_call
nodes.summary: Invokes a delegate (multicast callback): reads (dg_page, dg_index) from stack, calls _function_call for the next registered function, copies arguments, advances dg_index. Handles v14 closure env_page and lambda struct_page propagation.

nodes.name: function_return
nodes.summary: Returns from current call frame: enforces stack balance (padding or trimming return values), handles v14 method struct_page phantom slot removal, decrements call_stack_ptr, unrefs local page, restores IP.

nodes.name: ain_return_slots_type
nodes.summary: Computes the number of VM stack slots a function's return type occupies (1 or 2 for v14 2-slot types).

nodes.name: vm_call
nodes.summary: External API to invoke a bytecode function from C HLL code: saves/restores IP, calls function_call or method_call, runs vm_execute until VM_RETURN.

nodes.name: vm_call_nopop
nodes.summary: Like vm_call but copies args from stack to local page WITHOUT popping (HLL callback convention). Sets closure struct_page / env_page from hll_func_obj.

nodes.name: system_call
nodes.summary: Dispatches system.* built-in calls (SYS_EXIT, SYS_PEEK, SYS_SLEEP, SYS_GLOBAL_SAVE/LOAD, SYS_RESUME_SAVE/LOAD, SYS_MSGBOX, SYS_ERROR, SYS_GET_TIME, etc.). ~40 cases.

nodes.name: execute_instruction
nodes.summary: Inlined opcode handler: giant switch over all ~200 opcodes. Implements stack management (PUSH/POP/DUP/SWAP/REF), variable access (PUSHGLOBALPAGE, PUSHLOCALPAGE, SH_*), control flow (CALLFUNC, CALLMETHOD, CALLHLL, RETURN, JUMP, IFZ/IFNZ), object lifetime (NEW/DELETE/SP_INC), arithmetic, string ops, array ops, v14 X_* ops, DG_CALLBEGIN/DG_CALL delegate dispatch.

nodes.name: vm_execute
nodes.summary: Main interpreter loop: fetch opcode, call execute_instruction, advance IP. Includes depth guard (max 10), heartbeat logging every 50M insns, event pump + gfx_swap every 256K insns, periodic GC every 10s, vm_call timeout unwinding.

nodes.name: vm_execute_ain
nodes.summary: Top-level AIN executor: initialises heap, call stack, func_flags, global page, global variables, calls alloc function, v14 struct repair passes, global constructors, then calls main function via vm_call.

nodes.name: get_switch_address
nodes.summary: Looks up a SWITCH table entry by value; falls back to default_address or next instruction.

nodes.name: scenario_jump
nodes.summary: Flushes the entire call stack and jumps the IP to a scenario label address.

nodes.name: scenario_call
nodes.summary: Like scenario_jump but sets up a new call frame for a scenario function page.

nodes.name: vm_stack_trace
nodes.summary: Dumps the call stack (function name + address) to stderr for crash diagnostics.

nodes.name: _vm_error
nodes.summary: Fatal VM error: logs message + instruction name + stack trace, triggers debugger REPL or sys_exit.

nodes.name: vm_sleep
nodes.summary: Sleeps for ms milliseconds via SDL_Delay.

nodes.name: vm_time
nodes.summary: Returns elapsed milliseconds since SDL init via SDL_GetTicks.

nodes.name: vm_exit
nodes.summary: Frees VM resources and calls sys_exit.

nodes.name: math.jaf

nodes.name: strings.jaf

nodes.name: structs.jaf
